data.name: FieldRequired
data.value: {0} is required.

data.name: PermissionCodeRequired
data.value: Permission code is required.

data.name: PermissionCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Permission code must use 'module.resource.action' or 'module.action' format.

data.name: PermissionCodeEmptySegment
data.value: Permission code contains empty segments.

data.name: SystemRoleRenameForbidden
data.value: System roles cannot be renamed.

data.name: SystemPermissionRenameForbidden
data.value: System permissions cannot be renamed.

data.name: RoleUnknownPermission
data.value: Role '{0}' references unknown permission '{1}'.

data.name: ValidationFailed
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: InternalError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: BadRequest
data.value: The request is invalid.

data.name: RefreshTokenInvalidExpiry
data.value: Refresh token expiry must be in the future.

data.name: RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: Refresh token has expired.

data.name: RefreshTokenRevoked
data.value: Refresh token has been revoked.

data.name: RefreshTokenInvalid
data.value: Refresh token is invalid.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: AccountInactive
data.value: This account is inactive.

data.name: EmailNotConfirmed
data.value: Email address has not been confirmed.

data.name: JwtConfigMissing
data.value: JWT configuration is missing or invalid.

data.name: EmailInvalid
data.value: A valid email address is required.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: InvalidVerificationLink
data.value: The email verification link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: InvalidPasswordResetLink
data.value: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: EntityDeleted
data.value: This resource has been deleted.

data.name: SessionNotFound
data.value: Session was not found.

data.name: SessionIdRequired
data.value: A session identifier is required for this operation.

data.name: CatalogCodeTooLong
data.value: Catalog code must be 64 characters or fewer.

data.name: CatalogDecimalPlacesOutOfRange
data.value: Decimal places must be between 0 and 6.

data.name: CatalogItemNotFound
data.value: Catalog item was not found.

data.name: AssetNotFound
data.value: Asset was not found.

data.name: AssetPriceInvalid
data.value: Asset price must be zero or greater.

data.name: AssetAvailabilityRangeInvalid
data.value: Availability end date must be on or after the start date.

data.name: AssetAvailabilityOverlap
data.value: Availability block overlaps an existing blocked range.

data.name: AssetAvailabilityNotFound
data.value: Availability block was not found.

data.name: AssetMediaNotFound
data.value: Asset media item was not found.

data.name: AssetPricingRequired
data.value: Asset pricing is required before publish.

data.name: AssetLocationRequired
data.value: Asset location is required before publish.

data.name: AssetImageRequired
data.value: At least one image is required before publish.

data.name: AssetInvalidStatusTransition
data.value: This status transition is not allowed for the asset.

data.name: AssetPendingApprovalLocked
data.value: Asset cannot be edited while pending approval.

data.name: AssetArchived
data.value: Archived assets cannot be modified.

data.name: AssetAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have access to this asset.

data.name: AssetStatusCodeInvalid
data.value: Unknown asset status code.

data.name: MoneyAmountInvalid
data.value: Money amount must be zero or greater.

data.name: MoneyCurrencyMismatch
data.value: Money amounts must use the same currency.

data.name: BookingStatusCodeInvalid
data.value: Unknown booking status code.

data.name: BookingPeriodInvalid
data.value: Booking end date must be on or after the start date.

data.name: BookingBufferInvalid
data.value: Preparation buffer days cannot be negative.

data.name: BookingRentalDaysInvalid
data.value: Requested rental length is outside allowed min/max days.

data.name: BookingOwnAsset
data.value: You cannot book your own asset.

data.name: BookingConflict
data.value: The asset is not available for the selected dates.

data.name: BookingAssetNotBookable
data.value: Only published assets can be booked.

data.name: BookingPricingRequired
data.value: Asset pricing is required to create a booking.

data.name: BookingInvalidStatusTransition
data.value: This booking status transition is not allowed.

data.name: BookingAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have access to this booking.

data.name: BookingReasonTooLong
data.value: Reason must be 1000 characters or fewer.

data.name: BookingNotExpiredYet
data.value: Booking has not reached its expiry time yet.

data.name: BookingIdempotencyKeyRequired
data.value: Idempotency-Key header is required.

data.name: BookingStartDateInPast
data.value: Booking start date cannot be in the past.

data.name: BookingHoldExpired
data.value: This booking hold has expired.

data.name: BookingIdempotencyPayloadMismatch
data.value: Idempotency-Key was reused with a different request payload.

data.name: BookingRequestInProgress
data.value: A booking request with this Idempotency-Key is already being processed. Retry after a short wait.

data.name: BookingDriverNotSupported
data.value: This asset does not support driver requests.

data.name: BookingDeliveryNotSupported
data.value: This asset does not support delivery requests.

data.name: BookingPickupAddressRequired
data.value: Pickup address is required when not using the asset location.

data.name: BookingDropoffAddressRequired
data.value: Dropoff address is required when not using the asset location.

data.name: JwtSecretPlaceholder
data.value: JWT signing key is a placeholder and must be replaced before running.

data.name: PaymentStatusCodeInvalid
data.value: Unknown payment status code.

data.name: PaymentProviderCodeInvalid
data.value: Unknown payment provider code.

data.name: PaymentAttemptKindInvalid
data.value: Unknown payment attempt kind.

data.name: PaymentAttemptResultInvalid
data.value: Unknown payment attempt result.

data.name: PaymentRefundStatusInvalid
data.value: Unknown refund status code.

data.name: PaymentAmountInvalid
data.value: Payment amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: PaymentIdempotencyKeyInvalid
data.value: Payment idempotency key is invalid or too long.

data.name: PaymentProviderPaymentIdInvalid
data.value: Provider payment id is invalid or too long.

data.name: PaymentInvalidStatusTransition
data.value: This payment status transition is not allowed.

data.name: PaymentNotExpiredYet
data.value: Payment window has not elapsed yet.

data.name: PaymentRefundNotAllowed
data.value: Refunds are only allowed for succeeded or partially refunded payments.

data.name: PaymentRefundAmountInvalid
data.value: Refund amount must be greater than zero and not exceed the remaining refundable amount.

data.name: PaymentRefundReasonTooLong
data.value: Refund reason is too long.
